eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED WEEKLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Alpine, CA; at 2:54 PM on APR 4, 2019 Effective until 2:54 PM APR 5, 2019. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
This is a required weekly test by the California Highway Patrol of the Emergency Alert System.  This is only a test.
THIS IS A TEST FOR THE PILOT PROGRAM.
